item.title: Farewell To Winter: Chilly Sangria Recipe
item.description: What's better than a seasonal sangria recipe with orange for a simple drink to enjoy before winter ends? Here's the recipe for a delightful winter sangria.

item.title: Make-Ahead Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches
item.description: Here's a simple breakfast meal prep idea: make-ahead freezer sandwiches for busy mornings. Protein rich and easy to make, this recipe is the way to go for busy families.

media:content.media:description: Here's a simple breakfast meal prep idea: make-ahead freezer sandwiches for busy mornings. Protein rich and easy to make, this recipe is the way to go for busy families.

item.title: A Cozy Homemade Pizza Date Night
item.description: Try this for perfect date night setup. Nothing says romantic like a homemade pizza baked in the oven, some vine and candlelight.

item.title: A Cozy Kitchen: Sweet Sunday Breakfast
item.description: Sunday mornings just got a little cozier. Here's a simple and sweet Sunday breakfast recipe featuring toast, cinnamon, and bread.

item.title: Baklava inspired baked brie to impress any guest
item.description: Sweet, nutty and wonderfully creamy, this baklava inspired baked brie brings a unique and crowd pleasing twist to your next appetizer spread.

item.title: How to make stuffed arepas for a classic breakfast
item.description: Stuffed arepas are a beloved traditional staple that make for a hearty and satisfying breakfast. A classic recipe that is as comforting as it is delicious.
